query:
SELECT pc.*, c.name as cityName 
FROM partner_cities pc 
LEFT JOIN cities c ON pc.cityId = c.id 
WHERE pc.partnerId = (SELECT id FROM partners WHERE name = '测试合伙人' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1);
